content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Good Sequences". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/264/problem/B
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n. The second line contains n integers a1, a2, ..., an.

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
a = list(map(int, input().split()))
dp = [1] * (n + 1)
for i in range(1, n + 1):
    dp[i] = dp[i - 1] * 2
print(dp[n])
